message:
feat(workspace): extract frankenterm-core-tantivy sub-crate (ft-y0loj.1)

First Tier-1 leaf extraction from the ft-y0loj sub-crate-split arc.
Moves the Tantivy-backed lexical-search cluster into a new workspace
member at crates/frankenterm-core-tantivy/, removing it from the
parent crate's transitive build graph.

Modules moved (7 files, ~622 KiB of source):

  * tantivy_ingest          — index writer adapter + ingestion pipeline
  * tantivy_policy          — query policy / filter rules
  * tantivy_quality         — ranking-quality harness
  * tantivy_query           — search service + snippet extraction
  * tantivy_reindex         — index rebuild orchestration
  * recorder_lexical_ingest — LexicalIndexer wiring recorder → tantivy
  * recorder_lexical_schema — schema fingerprint + tokenizer registration

Plus the orphan tantivy_query_test_bug.rs file (untracked, never
declared in lib.rs) moved alongside for cleanliness.

## Dependency direction

The new sub-crate depends on `frankenterm-core` for the
`recorder_storage`, `recording`, `runtime_compat`/`runtime_async`,
`cx`, and `tuning_config` types it consumes. The reverse direction
(core → tantivy) is intentionally severed: the parent crate's lib.rs
no longer declares `pub mod tantivy_*` or `pub mod recorder_lexical_*`,
and there is NO re-export shim. This is the trade-off the proposal at
docs/proposals/ft-y0loj-frankenterm-core-sub-crate-split.md flagged:
goal G3 ("keep frankenterm-core's public API unchanged") is not
attainable for this extraction without creating a cargo cycle, so we
deliberately drop it for tantivy and update call-site imports
instead. No external (out-of-crate) consumer reaches for these
symbols today, so the migration cost is bounded to the in-tree
test/proptest suite.

## Internal rewrites

The 7 moved files contained ~120 `crate::*` references to siblings
that didn't move (`recorder_storage`, `recording`, `runtime_compat`,
`runtime_async`, `cx`, `tuning_config`). Mechanically rewrote each
to `frankenterm_core::*`. Intra-cluster `use crate::tantivy_*` /
`use crate::recorder_lexical_*` paths still resolve cleanly because
both ends of the edge moved to the new crate together.

## Test wiring

22 `#![cfg(feature = "recorder-lexical")]`-gated test files under
crates/frankenterm-core/tests/ imported the moved symbols via
`frankenterm_core::tantivy_*` / `frankenterm_core::recorder_lexical_*`.
Mass-rewrote each to `frankenterm_core_tantivy::*`. Added
`frankenterm-core-tantivy = { path = "../frankenterm-core-tantivy" }`
as a dev-dependency on `frankenterm-core` so the gated tests resolve.
This is a dev-only edge — production code in `frankenterm-core` does
NOT depend on the sub-crate.

## Workspace registration

* `crates/frankenterm-core-tantivy/Cargo.toml` — new manifest.
  Inherits workspace lints; declares deps on serde, serde_json,
  thiserror, tracing, chrono, sha2, regex, fancy-regex, hex,
  tantivy (workspace), and frankenterm-core (path dep, default
  features off). Dev-deps: tokio test-util, tempfile, proptest.
* `Cargo.toml` workspace `members` list — added the new path.

## Verification

  rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc6-target \
    CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang \
    CXX=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ \
    cargo check --workspace

  + cargo check -p frankenterm-core
  + cargo check -p frankenterm-core-tantivy
  + cargo check -p frankenterm-core --tests --features recorder-lexical

All four passes clean for everything ft-y0loj.1 owns. The only
remaining errors on `--all-targets` are cc7's WIP `min_supported`
field on `codec::GetCodecVersionResponse` (kuxho.3 lane, not in
scope here) — verified by filtering: zero non-codec errors after
the extraction.

## Out of scope (filed under follow-ups in ft-y0loj.6)

* Removing the now-dead `recorder-lexical` feature from
  `frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml` — the feature still gates the test
  files (which now resolve via the new sub-crate's path-dep) so
  it's not strictly dead; cleanup deferred until phase-6 measurement.
* Moving the test files themselves into `frankenterm-core-tantivy/tests/`
  — the dev-dep edge keeps them runnable in place; relocation can
  happen alongside the phase-6 work without blocking other tier-1
  cuts.

cc7 lane (codec/, kuxho.3 field add) untouched.

 ]

@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ resolver = "2"
 members = [
     "crates/frankenterm",
     "crates/frankenterm-core",
+    "crates/frankenterm-core-tantivy",
     "crates/frankenterm-gui",
     "crates/frankenterm-mux-server",
     "crates/frankenterm-mux-server-impl",

@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-core-tantivy"
+description = "Tantivy-backed lexical search sub-crate extracted from frankenterm-core (ft-y0loj.1)"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+# Sub-crate carved out of frankenterm-core under ft-y0loj.1 (Tier-1 leaf
+# extraction). Modules: tantivy_ingest, tantivy_policy, tantivy_quality,
+# tantivy_query, tantivy_reindex, recorder_lexical_ingest,
+# recorder_lexical_schema. The split removes the `recorder-lexical` feature
+# from the parent crate's surface and keeps the Tantivy dependency out of
+# the GUI / fuzz / mux-server build graphs.
+#
+# Direction of the dep edge: this crate depends on `frankenterm-core` for
+# `recorder_storage` + `recording` types. The reverse direction (core →
+# tantivy) is intentionally severed — the `pub mod tantivy_*` declarations
+# in lib.rs are gone, and the four call sites that referenced these
+# modules from inside core (recorder_lexical_*, semantic_quality.rs,
+# tuning_config.rs) either moved with the cluster or dropped to
+# doc-comment refs only. No cargo cycle.
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+thiserror = { workspace = true }
+tracing = { workspace = true }
+chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock", "serde"] }
+sha2 = { workspace = true }
+regex = { workspace = true }
+fancy-regex = { workspace = true }
+hex = "0.4"
+
+# The Tantivy stack (the whole point of this sub-crate).
+tantivy = { workspace = true }
+
+# Parent crate provides the recorder/recording/runtime/tuning types we
+# consume. `default-features = false` keeps the dep lean — we don't need
+# any of the parent's optional features.
+frankenterm-core = { path = "../frankenterm-core", default-features = false }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["test-util"] }
+tempfile = "3.23.0"
+proptest = "1.8.0"

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+//! `frankenterm-core-tantivy` — Tantivy-backed lexical search sub-crate
+//! extracted from `frankenterm-core` under ft-y0loj.1.
+//!
+//! Modules in this crate (all unconditionally compiled — the `recorder-lexical`
+//! feature flag that gated them in the parent crate is encoded by the
+//! crate-membership decision instead: consumers that don't need lexical
+//! search simply don't depend on this crate):
+//!
+//! - [`tantivy_ingest`]   — Tantivy index writer adapter + ingestion pipeline
+//! - [`tantivy_policy`]   — query policy / filter rules
+//! - [`tantivy_quality`]  — ranking-quality harness
+//! - [`tantivy_query`]    — search service + snippet extraction
+//! - [`tantivy_reindex`]  — index rebuild orchestration
+//! - [`recorder_lexical_ingest`] — `LexicalIndexer` wiring the recorder
+//!   ingestion pipeline into the Tantivy stack
+//! - [`recorder_lexical_schema`] — schema fingerprint + tokenizer registration
+//!
+//! ## Dependency direction
+//!
+//! This crate depends on `frankenterm-core` for the `recorder_storage` and
+//! `recording` types it consumes. The reverse direction (core → tantivy)
+//! is intentionally severed; the parent crate's `lib.rs` no longer
+//! declares `pub mod tantivy_*`. Cargo cycle-free by construction.
+
+pub mod recorder_lexical_ingest;
+pub mod recorder_lexical_schema;
+pub mod tantivy_ingest;
+pub mod tantivy_policy;
+pub mod tantivy_quality;
+pub mod tantivy_query;
+pub mod tantivy_reindex;
